properties.name: auto-dismiss
properties.description: Sets the Menu to close when focus is lost

properties.name: open
properties.description: Sets the open state of the Menu

properties.name: placement
properties.description: Sets the desired position of the Menu relative to it's anchor element

events.name: open
events.description: Fired when the menu is opened

events.name: close
events.description: Fired when the menu is closed

slots.name: default
slots.description: For Menu Item components or HTML elements with the `role` or `menuitem`

slots.name: header
slots.description: Add content to the top of Menu

slots.name: action-items
slots.description: Add action items to the end of Menu

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Moves focus into the Menu. If there is a child with the `autofocus` attribute, it will be focused. Otherwise, the first Menu Item will be focused.
